nodes.text: Address? Yeah — eight-oh-three Kellner Road. Apartment 2B. It's the one with the brown shutters they keep saying they'll repaint. Been there about four years.

responses.text: Any recent changes to your address?

nodes.text: Nah. I keep thinking about moving — my buddy's got a place over on the east side, cheaper rent — but I'd have to update like fifteen different things. So. Brown shutters it is.
Perfect. I'm gonna go wash my hands before I touch anything else in this store.
